mechanism_narrative: A falling FEDFUNDS rate lowers discount rates and reduces financing pressure on equities, so a downward 3-month trend in policy rates predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day SPX forward returns are not higher after negative 3-month changes in FEDFUNDS, or if the signal's rolling 2-year Rank IC stays below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: A sudden rise in UNRATE above its recent trend signals labor-market deterioration and impending earnings downgrades, which should depress S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce positive 20-day SPX returns more than 60% of the time, or if the average triggered return is not below the unconditional mean by at least 0.5 percentage points.

mechanism_narrative: When RSAFS is accelerating while HOUST is still weak, nominal spending is supporting revenue expectations without a matching housing-led broadening of demand, which should lift S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if the interaction term does not outperform either single series alone in walk-forward testing, or if 60-day forward returns are not positive when RSAFS growth is above trend and HOUST is below trend.

mechanism_narrative: An acceleration in INDPRO indicates improving industrial supply conditions and higher realized output, which should support cyclical earnings expectations and positive S&P 500 returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Reject if positive INDPRO momentum is followed by non-positive 5-day SPX returns in more than half of triggered cases, or if short-horizon Rank IC is indistinguishable from zero.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS remains near the zero lower bound while CPIAUCSL is rising, real rates fall and equity duration becomes more valuable, creating positive S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint condition does not improve 20-day returns relative to either series separately, or if returns are negative in more than 55% of low-rate inflation episodes.

mechanism_narrative: A decline in GDPC1 growth signals weakening aggregate demand and lower forward earnings, so weaker quarterly GDP momentum predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Reject if lower GDPC1 growth does not correspond to lower 60-day SPX returns in walk-forward tests, or if the sign flips in more than one major rolling subsample.

mechanism_narrative: When PAYEMS growth falls while UNRATE rises, payroll deterioration confirms labor-market slack and weak consumer income prospects, which should push S&P 500 returns negative over the next month.
failure_condition: Reject if the joint labor deterioration signal fails to beat either proxy alone, or if 20-day SPX returns are not negative in at least 55% of triggered windows.

mechanism_narrative: In a manufacturing downturn, a rebound in INDPRO after a prior contraction signals inventory rebuilding and improving realized output, which should generate positive S&P 500 returns over the next quarter.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO 3-month change turns positive after being negative
failure_condition: Reject if post-trough positive INDPRO inflections do not produce above-baseline 60-day SPX returns, or if the signal's performance disappears outside a single short episode.
